case_title: ARTHUR J ROCHE VS. SURF CITY SQUEEZE FRANCHISE CORPORATION WHICH WILL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROCHE, ARTHUR J AS TO DEFENDANT SURF CITY SQUEEZE FRANCHISE CORPORATION WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS SCS FRANCHISE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SURF CITY SQUEEZE FRANCHISE CORPORATION WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS SCS FRANCHISE CORPORATION $6,399.20 PRINCIPAL, $45.53 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,548.73, TOTAL - $6,548.73
